heading: Next Steps
body:
- To learn how to create embeddings from data and load them into Atlas, see [How to Create Vector Embeddings Manually](create-vector-embeddings).

- To learn how to implement retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), see [Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with MongoDB](avs-rag).

- To integrate MongoDB Vector Search with popular AI frameworks and services, see [MongoDB AI Integrations](ai-integrations).

- To build production ready AI chatbots using MongoDB Vector Search, see the [MongoDB Chatbot Framework](https://mongodb.github.io/chatbot/).

- To learn how to implement RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) without the need for API (Application Programming Interface) keys or credits, see [Build a Local RAG Implementation with MongoDB Vector Search](local-rag).
